verses.1: Now the word of the LORD came to me, saying,
verses.2: “Go and proclaim in the hearing of Jerusalem that this is what the LORD says:
verses.4: Hear the word of the LORD, O house of Jacob, and all you families of the house of Israel.
verses.5: This is what the LORD says:
verses.19: declares the Lord GOD of Hosts.
verses.31: You people of this generation, consider the word of the LORD:
